summary: Iteration 25 - Strict Search and Random Category features fully tested and verified. All 16 backend tests passed. UI tests confirmed strict search behavior and Random category functionality.
passed_tests: Strict Search - 'shak' returns 0 results (partial match blocked)
Strict Search - 'tom' returns 0 results (partial match blocked)
Strict Search - 'tay' returns 0 results (partial match blocked)
Strict Search - 'bey' returns 0 results (partial match blocked)
Strict Search - 'leo' returns 0 results (partial match blocked)
Strict Search - 'brad' returns 0 results (partial match blocked)
Strict Search - 'shakira' returns exactly 1 result (Shakira, A-LIST, £15M)
Strict Search - 'tom hanks' returns exactly 1 result (Tom Hanks, A-LIST, £13M)
Strict Search - 'adele' returns exactly 1 result (Adele, single-name celebrity)
Strict Search - 'beyonce' returns exactly 1 result (Beyoncé)
Strict Search - 'rihanna' returns exactly 1 result (Rihanna)
Strict Search - 'taylor swift' returns exactly 1 result
Strict Search - 'madonna' returns exactly 1 result
Strict Search - 'cher' returns exactly 1 result
Strict Search - 'drake' returns exactly 1 result
Strict Search - Case insensitive (SHAKIRA = shakira)
Random Category - Appears in categories list with id='random', name='Random', icon='shuffle'
Random Category - Returns 8 celebrities from various categories
Random Category - Returns different results on refresh (true randomness)
Random Category - Returns celebrities from mixed categories (athletes, movie_stars, musicians, royals, tv_actors)
UI - Random category button visible with shuffle icon
UI - Search input shows no dropdown for partial names
UI - Search input shows correct result for full names
critical_code_review_comments: Strict search implementation in autocomplete_search function (line 3705-3905) correctly blocks partial matches
Single-name celebrities (shakira, adele, beyonce, etc.) handled via single_name_celebs dictionary (line 3762-3784)
Random category implemented in get_celebrities_by_category function (line 4437-4451) using MongoDB $sample for true randomness
Random category correctly added to CATEGORIES list (line 1429) with shuffle icon
CategoryFilter.jsx correctly imports Shuffle icon and maps it to 'random' category
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_25_strict_search.py - Created comprehensive test suite for strict search and random category
context_for_next_testing_agent: Strict search and Random category features verified working. Partial names (shak, tom, tay, bey, leo, brad) return 0 results. Full names (shakira, tom hanks, adele, beyonce, rihanna, taylor swift, madonna, cher, drake) return exactly 1 result. Random category returns 8 celebrities from mixed categories with true randomness on each request.
